topic: Collection of a 30-day overdue credit card balance and arrangement of a partial payment by bank transfer.

scoring_breakdown.justification: Policy: 30/30 because the agent arranged payment steps without moving or extending a due date. Sentiment: 30/30 for a friendly, professional exchange; Outcome: 30/30 because the customer agreed to a partial payment and received bank-transfer details; Politeness: 10/10 because the agent remained courteous and did not interrupt.
